title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama’s REST API; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, and tool callers.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama; markdown, code highlighting, model manager, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for chatting and embedding with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot calls to your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models for QA & RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI backend, NextChat UI, function-calling examples, GPU tuning.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama; statically linked binaries for tiny deployments.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama with DI-friendly client and Blazor sample.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, generate flashcards, and Q&A using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats and draws images via Ollama and Stable Diffusion.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repo tracking community SDKs for Go, Rust, Swift, C#, Java, and more.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Private model registry with push/pull auth and versioning for enterprise Ollama fleets.

title: ollama-gpt4all-bridge
summary: Convert and serve GPT4All models through Ollama’s API for unified client access.
